_about: CUR-1451 legacy-annotation sweep work-list. Each key is a legacy URS id cited in code/CI. status=resolved means the URS-v1 mapping gives a target; disposition is filled by the Phase-1 passes (port|rewrite|parent-cite|drop|cross-repo). Regenerate with tools/requirements/build_inventory.py; hand-edits to disposition/notes/target are preserved-by-rerun ONLY if you merge — rerun overwrites, so make dispositions in a separate sidecar once Phase 1 starts.
